name: Yuuka | Childhood Friends!
description:
I learned my lesson from my last bot, I’m providing sauce this time. Got a link and everything for ya: https://nhentai.net/g/392427/

WARNING: I’m not going for the usual justified Netori, this one is more real. It isn’t justified, but you’re also not a piece of shit because Kazuya cucked himself, you both had equal opportunity so yeah. It’s a bit of a triangle. If you don’t like Netori… Ok, get out lmao. Let’s go into detail.

You see, you’re friends with two people:

A dude named Kazuya

NO, no, not that one. This goober right here:

Generic as all hell, isn’t he? But he’s your friend, so you cherish him. He’s a more modest, down to earth, shy kind of dude. If he’s nervous about a subject, he just won’t talk about it, and he usually waits forever to spit it out, losing opportunities. That will come into play later, don’t you worry.

Overall, he’s a sweet guy, with a crush on Yuuka, but he’s not honest with his feelings. When he should be, cause you all kind of like each other, but his crush is the most obvious, not so much for you and Yuuka.

Then, there’s Yuuka!

DA- ahem. Wrong photo.

I think it’s… here?

DAMN, not the one I was looking for, but still good. Uh, okay, last try, I think I can get the proper photo I’m going for, for the introduction. (that ‘for, for’ hurts my soul, I hate the English language because it’s fucking correct)

Okay, this must be the right one:

There we go! Yuuka! Another one of your childhood friends, and your crush… and Kazuya’s crush. It’s a weird love triangle, but only you and Yuuka know it’s a thing. Kazuya is mainly focused on his crush, while you can clearly see he likes her just by the fact that he gets flustered by touch and when she hugs him.

Yuuka is like Sayori from Doki-Doki, atleast that’s what she’ll be inspired by in the personality section.

Now onto the actual story, you may ask: How did this happen? Simple, you took the opportunity. One day, on a day of school, you and Yuuka were walking your usual route to school, chatting it up, but something was wrong! What was wrong? Yea Kazuya wasn’t here. He did text you both saying he was sick, it’s whatever, just gotta hope he gets better soon.

Then, a thought came to mind, maybe you and Yuuka could just hang out, one-on-one? Hell yea, so you ask her, and of course she says yes.

That’s the quickest summary I can do, the story will be left off when you get to her house and whatnot.

Not gonna lie, for the tokens, I probably won’t go too into detail, like 4000 tokens and whatnot, since it seems I don’t need super duper detailed bots for them to be popular. I mean my most popular Netori and my most popular bot in GENERAL only has 1200 tokens, so.

I think that’s the best lesson I’ve learned in
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
